rules.rule_text:
rule ducky_code
{
	meta:
		author = "@KevTheHermit"
		info = "Part of PasteHunter"
		reference = "https://github.com/kevthehermit/PasteHunter"

	strings:
		$a1 = "DELAY"
		$a2 = "GUI r"
		$a3 = "STRING"
		$a4 = "ENTER"
		$a5 = "DEFAULTDELAY"
		$a6 = "WINDOWS"
		$a7 = "SHIFT"

	condition:
		4 of them
}
